data.title: AdNeo Limited Announces Date for Annual General Meeting
data.description:
AD1 Holdings Ltd ( (AU:AD1) ) has issued an announcement.

AdNeo Limited has announced that its Annual General Meeting is scheduled for November 21, 2025, with the deadline for director nominations set for October 3, 2025. This announcement is part of AdNeo’s ongoing efforts to enhance shareholder value by strategically managing high-growth companies in the SaaS and innovative services sectors, which could impact its market positioning and stakeholder interests.

More about AD1 Holdings Ltd

AdNeo Ltd (ASX: AD1) is a company that actively acquires, owns, and manages high-growth companies in the SaaS and innovative services sectors. It focuses on strategically acquiring synergistic companies with significant growth potential to drive shareholder value. The company’s experienced management team enhances operational efficiency and stimulates innovation, opening new market opportunities to maximize profitability and ensure exceptional returns for shareholders.

Average Trading Volume: 165,210

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: A$14.08M

data.title: Brazilian Critical Minerals Limited Issues New Shares on ASX
data.description:
An update from BBX Minerals Limited ( (AU:BCM) ) is now available.

Brazilian Critical Minerals Limited has announced the issuance of 4,500,000 fully paid ordinary shares, which are set to be quoted on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the code BCM. This move is part of the company’s strategy to enhance its financial position and expand its market presence, potentially impacting its operational capabilities and offering new opportunities for stakeholders.

More about BBX Minerals Limited

Brazilian Critical Minerals Limited operates in the critical minerals industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources in Brazil. The company is involved in the production and supply of essential minerals that are crucial for various industrial applications.

data.title: Toho Bank Revises Financial Forecasts Upward Amid Improved Earnings
data.description:
An announcement from Toho Bank, Ltd. ( (JP:8346) ) is now available.

Toho Bank, Ltd. has revised its financial forecasts for the six months ending March 31, 2026, due to higher-than-expected interest income and gains related to securities, alongside lower credit-related expenses. These adjustments reflect a significant increase in expected profits and earnings per share, indicating a stronger financial performance than initially projected.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8346) stock is a Buy with a Yen450.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Toho Bank, Ltd. stock, see the JP:8346 Stock Forecast page.

More about Toho Bank, Ltd.

Toho Bank, Ltd. operates in the financial services industry, providing banking and financial solutions. The company focuses on offering a range of financial products and services to its clients, primarily in Japan, and is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market.

data.description:
An update from First Graphene Ltd ( (AU:FGR) ) is now available.

First Graphene Ltd has released its annual report for 2025, highlighting its position as the world’s largest producer of pure graphene. The report underscores the company’s strategic market positioning and its commitment to maintaining leadership in the graphene industry, which could have significant implications for stakeholders and the broader market.

The company is listed on multiple stock exchanges, including the Australian Securities Exchange, Frankfurt Stock Exchange, and the OTCQB market in the USA.

data.title: Emu NL Uncovers Undisclosed Shareholdings, Evaluates Compliance Options
data.description:
Emu NL ( (AU:EMU) ) has provided an update.

Emu NL has issued tracing notices under the Corporations Act to identify undisclosed substantial shareholders. The notices revealed that Morobe Blue Pty Ltd, owned by Mr. Thomas McCoy, holds 8,000,000 shares, representing 3.79% of Emu’s issued capital. Additionally, Mr. McCoy personally holds another 8,000,000 shares, also representing 3.79% of the company’s capital. Emu NL is evaluating its options to address any non-compliance with disclosure requirements for substantial shareholders.

More about Emu NL

Average Trading Volume: 279,673

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: A$6.34M

data.title: TBS HOLDINGS Reports Extraordinary Income from Securities Sale, Revises Profit Forecast Upward
data.description:
TBS HOLDINGS INC. ( (JP:9401) ) just unveiled an announcement.

TBS HOLDINGS, INC. has announced the sale of investment securities by its wholly-owned subsidiary, resulting in an extraordinary income of approximately 38.5 billion yen. This transaction has led to a significant upward revision of the company’s consolidated financial results forecast for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, with profit attributable to owners of the parent expected to increase by 90.9%. Despite this increase, the dividend forecast remains unchanged as the income will be allocated for growth investments.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9401) stock is a Buy with a Yen5326.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TBS HOLDINGS INC. stock, see the JP:9401 Stock Forecast page.

More about TBS HOLDINGS INC.

TBS HOLDINGS, INC. operates as a certified broadcasting holding company in Japan, focusing on enhancing corporate and shareholder value through sustainable business investments. The company is committed to maintaining sufficient shareholders’ equity to fulfill its public mission while providing stable dividends.

Average Trading Volume: 237,878

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen867.2B

data.description:

This move could potentially impact the company’s financial standing and market operations by increasing its share capital.
